title: evaporation summaries with field context
why_selected: Useful reference for combining repeated downstream summary charts with one spatial field strip so that composition-dependent evolution is visible both quantitatively and geometrically.
borrow: the pairing of repeated summary charts with one field-context strip
the use of one repeated chart grammar across several blends or cases
the idea that field context can stay compressed rather than dominating the page
avoid_copying: the exact fuel-component interpretation and panel count
the figure if the field strip does not actually help interpret the line charts
the full paper density when one case or one summary block is enough
